_note: REAL captured evidence, not a hand-authored fixture. Both events below are actual mcp__Gmail__create_draft calls executed live in a Lyhna agent session — and both are DRAFTS that were never sent (creating a draft sends nothing). The result ids and hashes are genuine; the owner email and recipients are redacted/synthetic. The demo (demo/live-gmail-witness.mjs) replays these captured events deterministically so CI stays offline. This is the UNIVERSAL-adapter path — direct single-system MCP tools, no wrapper family — which is the ~85% case, in contrast to the wrapper-family (Zapier/Apify) catch proven in slice 5.
source: mcp__Gmail__create_draft — real Gmail MCP calls, executed live. Both are DRAFTS; neither was sent.
